summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: Weak/no verification led to an incorrect deduction: the system concluded “Rebecca” was the missing giver simply because Rebecca was the only employee not mapped to one of the 11 listed gifts, without verifying that the actual task was to identify the missing gift assignment/person from incomplete gift data.

A.
